PLAITIFF'S COUNSEL ONLY APPEARS. THE COURT INFORMS COUNSEL THAT THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS NOT CONTESTED AND ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration And Staying Action Pending Determination Of Petition An Conclusion Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-18-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Joseph Leveroni, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney, 415.788.1900, for Plaintiffs Allen Matkins Leck Gamble Mallory & Natsis LLP and Robert R. Moore;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

DEFENDANTS ALLEN MATKINS LECK GAMBLE MALLORY & NATSIS, LLP, AND ROBERT MOORE's Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration And Staying Action Pending Determination Of Petition An Conclusion Of Arbitration.

The Court informs Mr. Leveroni that the tentative ruling was not contested and adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants' motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted.

Order signed. (See Word minutes or order signed this date for the Court's complete ruling.)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
